name: Aquiara by José María Borrás
description: A Repsol Guide Sol in 2026 —Menorca's only new one that year— for the restaurant of the Morvedra Nou rural hotel, a 1650 estate surrounded by olive and wild olive trees on the road to Macarella. Chef José María Borrás, born in Maó in 1999 and trained at Hofmann and in Japan, signs a seasonal tasting menu that translates Menorcan tradition through contemporary technique and local produce. As a guide, summer 2026: tasting menu €130, €210 with wine pairing.

practicalInfo.acceso: Morvedra Nou rural hotel, Camí de Macarella km 7 (Ciutadella). Approximate location: confirm the exact spot on the official website.
practicalInfo.horario: Indicative for 2026: dinner Wednesday to Saturday (7.30–9.30 pm) and Sunday also at lunchtime. The hotel is seasonal: confirm season and hours before going.
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: During the hotel's season (the property closes part of the year); booking is essential.

seo.description: Aquiara, José María Borrás's table at the Morvedra Nou hotel (Ciutadella): a 2026 Repsol Sol and a tasting menu of Menorcan tradition with contemporary technique.
